<!--
PR title: Conventional Commits format — {type}({scope}): {imperative, ≤72 chars}
This title becomes the squash commit on main. Make it count.
-->

## What

<!-- 1–2 sentences. What changes and why. -->

## Spec / Issue

<!-- Link to docs/specs/<file>.md or issue #. If neither exists, explain why. -->

## Acceptance criteria

<!-- Bulleted, copied from the spec. Each must map to a passing test. -->

- [ ]
- [ ]

## Approach

<!-- 2–4 bullets. The shape of the change, not a line-by-line walkthrough. -->

-

## Tests

<!-- What you wrote, where they live, and what they cover.
     If "no tests" — pick the row from CLAUDE.md §7 that applies and quote it. -->

-

## Manual steps

<!-- Migrations, env vars, dashboard config, feature flags, secrets to rotate.
     "None" is a valid answer — say it explicitly. -->

-

## Blast radius

<!-- Required for Significant work; one line for Standard.
     Consumers, schemas, public types, runtime behavior. -->

-

## Out of scope

<!-- Things you noticed but did not fix. Link the issues you filed. -->
